title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Huawei's announcement of Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the global semiconductor race. The video covers the role of EUV and DUV lithography, packaging, and logic folding in chip advancement amid US-China technology competition.
